mano_cua.result_summary: Tree组件点击反馈在Basic/Checkable/Selection示例中正常（有高亮选中状态变化），但存在明显间距视觉bug：所有非Virtual Scroll的预览框内容被垂直居中，上下各有约120-135px的异常空白区域（内容应从顶部开始而非居中）。Virtual Scroll示例无此问题但缺少点击选中反馈。节点间纵向间距(21-22px)正常，无重叠。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Tree click feedback works in Basic/Checkable/Selection examples (gray highlight on click, single selection toggles correctly, checkboxes cascade to children). Major visual bug: all non-Virtual-Scroll preview boxes have ~120-135px blank space top and bottom due to content being vertically centered instead of top-aligned. Virtual Scroll example content starts at top correctly but lacks click selection feedback.
